summary: ride-service had an OOMKill post-deploy. Metrics are within absolute thresholds but OOMKill indicates a critical deployment risk.
kargo_annotation: FAIL: ride-service OOMKilled post-deploy. Deployment risk CRITICAL. Do not promote.

recommendations: Actions required before promotion: 1. Increase ride-service memory limit in the deployment manifest.
Run: kubectl describe pod -n vroom-staging -l app=ride-service | grep -A5 OOMKill
Do not promote until OOMKill root cause is identified and memory limit is adjusted.
